notes: Silent-ignore now ~3.92 days past window close and crossing into a 4-day threshold at the next poll. Analyst handoff: the PRED-105 silent_ignore entry in data/uncounted-failures.json was already added in prior polls; no new action needed unless the dome adjudicates or goalposts-moves. Counterargument for record: absence of adjudication remains consistent with 'experiment-not-yet-performed-or-reported' in principle. Opposing considerations still apply: (a) the 14-day window already budgets the full growth interval, so 94h past close is well outside any plausible post-hoc data-collection delay for a 14-day cucumber-growth protocol; (b) predictions.html byte-identity across 5 consecutive polls (md5 unchanged since 2026-04-20T22:10Z) rules out edit-and-revert churn — the file is not being touched at all; (c) the scorecard.json denominators continue to exclude PRED-105 despite the window having closed. Also note: last poll recorded 1× ECM Daily Review commit (daily_review.json regenerated 2026-04-21T07:06Z); this poll window saw zero ECM Daily Review commits (next auto-run due ~2026-04-22T07:06Z UTC), so daily_review.json still reads 2026-04-21T07:06:10Z — expected behavior, not an anomaly. Next-poll escalation watch unchanged: (1) goalpost-move → CRITICAL, (2) WIN-070 with PRED-105 claim → CRITICAL hard-escalation, (3) first manual commit would be substantive minimum and must be diffed for canary/parameter changes.
